Regression tests load full grids from [`2019/`](../2019/) (`picks2019worldsbest.csv`, `masterbracket8teams.csv`, `masterbracket4teams.csv`) so scenario scores match archived `scenario_pts_*_WB.csv` outputs.

For local experiments, add small CSVs here and point `picks_csv_path` / `master_csv_path` in a test config.
